message:
feat: Add Tokyo Night theme and improve Unicode handling

Add Tokyo Night color scheme to glamour (soft purple/blue aesthetic)
and enhance the Dracula theme's block quote and list styling.

Fix file browser display width calculation to properly handle
multi-byte Unicode characters using unicode-width crate. This
prevents layout breakage when filenames contain CJK characters,
emoji, or other wide glyphs.

Improve e2e test organization with consolidated test harness module
and reduce test verbosity by streamlining common setup code.

- Add tokyo_night_style() with #bb9af7 headings, #9ece6a code
- Refine dracula_style() block quote and enumeration colors
- Replace char count with UnicodeWidthStr::width() in truncation
- Add pad_display_width() helper for consistent column alignment
- Consolidate wish e2e tests into single test harness entry point

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-212m","title":"Parity closure plan (2026-01-25)","description":"Top-level parity closure plan from the latest conformance run (2026-01-25). This epic tracks infra reliability, crate-specific parity gaps, platform limitations, documentation completeness, and expanded conformance coverage. FEATURE_PARITY.md is the source of truth and must be updated after each significant change.

Current blockers from the latest run:
- benchmark_e2e::compilation_tests::test_benchmarks_compile fails (cargo cache lock + huh KeyMap file_picker initializer).
- Glamour has 18 skipped fixtures (lists, links, blockquotes, presets).
- Lipgloss has 1 skipped fixture (partial border edges).
- Huh has 4 skipped fixtures (textarea).
- Bubbletea custom I/O injection still noted as incomplete.
- README limitations require verification (Wish beta/Windows SSH, mouse drag, Unicode).

Scope: close all child epics and update FEATURE_PARITY.md with zero failures and no remaining parity skips except explicitly documented exclusions.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:

- cargo test -p charmed_conformance completes with 0 failures; any remaining skips are explicitly justified in FEATURE_PARITY.md.

+
+/// Creates the Tokyo Night style configuration.
+///
+/// Tokyo Night theme colors:
+/// - Text: #a9b1d6 (soft gray-blue)
+/// - Heading: #bb9af7 (soft purple)
+/// - Code: #9ece6a (green)
+/// - Link: #7aa2f7 (blue)
+pub fn tokyo_night_style() -> StyleConfig {
+    StyleConfig {
+        document: StyleBlock::new()
+            .style(
+                StylePrimitive::new()
+                    .block_prefix("\n")
+                    .block_suffix("\n")
+                    .color("#a9b1d6"),
+            )
+            .margin(DEFAULT_MARGIN),
+        block_quote: StyleBlock::new().indent(1).indent_token("│ "),
+        list: StyleList::new()
+            .block(StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().color("#a9b1d6")))
+            .level_indent(DEFAULT_LIST_INDENT),
+        heading: StyleBlock::new().style(
             StylePrimitive::new()
-                .prefix(" ")
-                .suffix(" ")
-                .color("#50fa7b")
-                .background_color("#44475a"),
+                .block_suffix("\n")
+                .color("#bb9af7")
+                .bold(true),
         ),
+        h1: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("# ").bold(true)),
+        h2: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("## ")),
+        h3: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("### ")),
+        h4: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("#### ")),
+        h5: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("##### ")),
+        h6: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().prefix("###### ")),
+        strikethrough: StylePrimitive::new().crossed_out(true),
+        emph: StylePrimitive::new().italic(true),
+        strong: StylePrimitive::new().bold(true),
+        horizontal_rule: StylePrimitive::new()
+            .color("#565f89")
+            .format("\n--------\n"),
+        item: StylePrimitive::new().block_prefix("• "),
+        enumeration: StylePrimitive::new().block_prefix(". ").color("#7aa2f7"),
+        task: StyleTask::new().ticked("[✓] ").unticked("[ ] "),
+        link: StylePrimitive::new().color("#7aa2f7").underline(true),
+        link_text: StylePrimitive::new().color("#2ac3de"),
+        image: StylePrimitive::new().color("#7aa2f7").underline(true),
+        image_text: StylePrimitive::new()
+            .color("#2ac3de")
+            .format("Image: {{.text}} →"),
+        code: StyleBlock::new().style(StylePrimitive::new().color("#9ece6a")),
         code_block: StyleCodeBlock::new().block(
             StyleBlock::new()
-                .style(StylePrimitive::new().color("#f8f8f2"))
+                .style(StylePrimitive::new().color("#ff9e64"))
                 .margin(DEFAULT_MARGIN),
         ),
-        definition_description: StylePrimitive::new().block_prefix("\n→ "),
+        definition_description: StylePrimitive::new().block_prefix("\n🠶 "),
         ..Default::default()
     }
 }

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+//! End-to-end SSH integration tests for wish.
+//!
+//! These tests require the `ssh` command to be available on the system.
+//! Run with: `cargo test -p wish --test e2e -- --ignored` for stress tests.
+
+#[path = "e2e/mod.rs"]
+mod tests;
